name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: The week that swung it
body:
In years ahead, political watchers like you and me are going to look back at this week. We’ll remember this as the week that swung this election... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/we-have-to-earn-it-467577?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1a444abdd9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_The Week That Swung It_** In years ahead, political watchers like you and me are going to look back at this week. We’ll remember this as the week that swung this election for conservative outsider **Mike Braun**.

Here's a recap.

On Monday, **Mike Braun** rallied alongside Hoosiers and **Donald Trump Jr.** – and it was quite the event. Don Jr. made it clear that his dad needs Mike Braun as an ally and a fighter in the Senate. I even got to address the crowd (check out the [full video here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=58e986279f&e=1acd9bb3d6))!

That morning, the campaign released a new internal memo that shows our candidate is surging in this race. For three straight weeks, polling shows that **Mike Braun** is leading Democrat Joe Donnelly. Mike’s numbers are on a steady incline, while Democrat Donnelly’s numbers languish. In fact, the memo shows that Donnelly now holds a net unfavorable rating while Mike holds a favorable rating. It’s really an incredible memo, which you can [read for yourself here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=deeb9064ea&e=1acd9bb3d6).

And then the next day, another public poll came out, and it showed the same thing. In [the poll](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c00962d9d5&e=1acd9bb3d6), **Mike Braun** leads Democrat Donnelly by a four point margin – 47%-43%

But it doesn’t stop there. Just yesterday,**Mike Braun** released what may be the cleverest ad of the election cycle, [called Inflatable](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b3e698ef2b&e=1acd9bb3d6). The ad is fun, and will definitely catch your attention when you [watch it](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e0417f689e&e=1acd9bb3d6) or see it on TV.

And what’s great is that it shows the Democrat Joe Donnelly that Hoosiers have known for years. He’s a senator with almost no conviction – and like the inflatable tube man in the ad, he blows in the wind and won’t stand for anything. As you’ve seen in his ads, he’ll say anything to get re-elected, while doing nothing for us in Washington.

It’s been a great week for **Mike Braun**! And with your help, I know we’ll continue this momentum through Election Day.

-Kyle Hupfer

_PHOTO:**Indiana GOP **__**Chairman Kyle Hupfer** addresses a crowd of hundreds of Hoosiers on Monday afternoon in Hancock County. **Donald Trump Jr., Governor Holcomb** and **Senator Todd Young** rallied the crowd in support of **Greg Pence** , Indiana’s 6th District candidate for Congress, and **Mike Braun**._
---
| |
---
| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3e217b55be&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Delivering Results_**
As you’ve been flipping through channels for the last few weeks, between U.S. Senate ads you may have seen **Governor Eric Holcomb**. He’s not on your ballot this year, but he’s narrating an excellent new ad about the results you’re seeing at the Statehouse, and three public servants who are making it all happen.

In the ad, Governor Holcomb explains why he’s supporting Secretary of State Connie Lawson, Auditor Tera Klutz and Treasurer Kelly Mitchell.
* **Secretary of State Connie Lawson** is safeguarding the security of our elections and protects seniors from scams.
* **Auditor Tera Klutz** is delivering government transparency and accountability.
* **Treasurer Kelly Mitchell** has built a strong track record of protecting Hoosier taxpayers.

[Check the ad out here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8867b9d681&e=1acd9bb3d6), and be on the lookout tomorrow as **Governor Holcomb** joins the [Right Track Results Tour](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b1fe1ad6cb&e=1acd9bb3d6) for stops across Southern and Central Indiana!
---
|
---
| | **_The Mike Braun Corner_**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=678ca80083&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Mike Braun's Incredible Week!_**
**Mike Braun** has had an incredible week! He's absolutely everywhere and there's no question that the momentum in this race is fully in his corner.

With all this action, here's a quick summary of what you may have missed:
* **Donald Trump Jr. Rally:** **Mike Braun** stood beside **President Trump** ’s eldest son on Monday at a rally in Greenfield. In case you missed it, check out [photos of the event](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=579222794f&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [watch Donald Trump Jr.’s speech here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1243f92fff&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
* **Solutions Tour Continues** : **Mike Braun** took his Solutions Tour to Greenwood, touring Meredith Machinery, a manufacturing company that is passing its savings through **President Trump** ’s tax reform along to its employees! Check out [photos of the stop](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8938cc30c3&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
* **Talking About the Issues** :** Mike Braun** is making local and national headlines! On Wednesday, he went on Fox & Friends ([check it out here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c1835b3b59&e=1acd9bb3d6)) and sat down with WIBC’s Tony Katz for an interview ([listen here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2fe7b5fab2&e=1acd9bb3d6)).
* **New “Inflatable” Ad** : Yesterday, **Mike Braun** debuted what’s potentially the best ad of the general election so far, called Inflatable. It shows the true Democrat Joe Donnelly – a senator who blows in the wind and won’t stand for Hoosiers. Watch it [now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8e671dd283&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

And if you're in Southern or Central Indiana, make sure to [check out this weekend’s schedule](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dfcb4aea7f&e=1acd9bb3d6) for **Mike Braun** and the Right Track Results Tour!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7d61adbd17&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Follow the Right Track Results Tour!_**
[_The Right Track Results Tour_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f7aad44404&e=1acd9bb3d6) is entering its third weekend! Your team of proven Republican leaders are crisscrossing Indiana between now and Election Day, visiting all corners of the state to talk about the RESULTS they’re delivering for Hoosiers!

Today, you'll find our Right Track Results team at two events in Northwest Indiana– one in La Porte, the other in Valparaiso. And then tomorrow, **Mike Braun** , **Governor Eric Holcomb** , and our congressional and statewide candidates will be taking the Right Track Results bus to stops across Central and Southern Indiana!

Visit [RightTrackResults.com](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=465f06bad5&e=1acd9bb3d6) to see when we’ll be in your area, and follow along with the tour with the hashtag #RightTrackResults!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3a7a3a5600&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Early Voting Is Now Open!_** Already know how you plan to vote in this year's general election? Then it's time to VOTE! Early voting is now open across the state.

Not sure where to vote early, or early vote hours in your county? Check [Vote.GOP](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fb5bb15c3e&e=1acd9bb3d6) now to get all the information you need!
---
| [Visit Vote.GOP Now!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=137379523f&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Visit Vote.GOP Now!")
---
|
---
| | **_Indiana Fact of the Week_**
---
|
---
| **_Indiana Legislators Are NOT Yet Required to Pass a Balanced Budget!_**
When you go vote, the first item on your ballot will be Public Question #1, also known as the Balanced Budget Amendment. We encourage you to vote _**YES**_ on this amendment, which will require Indiana legislators to pass a balanced state budget every two years.

Here are the fast facts about the Balanced Budget Amendment:
* Currently in Indiana, the Generally Assembly is prohibited from carrying government debt year-to-year, but legislators are NOT required to pass a balanced budget – a common misconception.
* Future generations of Hoosiers deserve the assurance that their leaders at the Statehouse will be fiscally responsible and live within their means. Back in the early 2000s when Democrats where in charge, that definitely wasn't the case as bills went unpaid and the state went deep in the red.
* With the amendment in place, state pension funds – including teacher, police & firefighter retirement accounts – would be protected. In fact, legislators would be _required_ to actuarially fund these accounts.

Check out this [fact sheet](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=36433c6a7d&e=1acd9bb3d6) on the Balanced Budget Amendment, and feel free to share it with your fellow Hoosiers!

clean_body: In years ahead, political watchers like you and me are going to look back at this week. We’ll remember this as the week that swung this election... | | | | | | | | The Week That Swung It In years ahead, political watchers like you and me are going to look back at this week. We’ll remember this as the week that swung this election for conservative outsider Mike Braun. Here's a recap. On Monday, Mike Braun rallied alongside Hoosiers and Donald Trump Jr. – and it was quite the event. Don Jr. made it clear that his dad needs Mike Braun as an ally and a fighter in the Senate. I even got to address the crowd (check out the )! That morning, the campaign released a new internal memo that shows our candidate is surging in this race. For three straight weeks, polling shows that Mike Braun is leading Democrat Joe Donnelly. Mike’s numbers are on a steady incline, while Democrat Donnelly’s numbers languish. In fact, the memo shows that Donnelly now holds a net unfavorable rating while Mike holds a favorable rating. It’s really an incredible memo, which you can . And then the next day, another public poll came out, and it showed the same thing. In , Mike Braun leads Democrat Donnelly by a four point margin – 47%-43% But it doesn’t stop there. Just yesterday,Mike Braun released what may be the cleverest ad of the election cycle, . The ad is fun, and will definitely catch your attention when you or see it on TV. And what’s great is that it shows the Democrat Joe Donnelly that Hoosiers have known for years. He’s a senator with almost no conviction – and like the inflatable tube man in the ad, he blows in the wind and won’t stand for anything. As you’ve seen in his ads, he’ll say anything to get re-elected, while doing nothing for us in Washington. It’s been a great week for Mike Braun! And with your help, I know we’ll continue this momentum through Election Day. -Kyle Hupfer PHOTO:Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer addresses a crowd of hundreds of Hoosiers on Monday afternoon in Hancock County. Donald Trump Jr., Governor Holcomb and Senator Todd Young rallied the crowd in support of Greg Pence , Indiana’s 6th District candidate for Congress, and Mike Braun. | | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Delivering Results As you’ve been flipping through channels for the last few weeks, between U.S. Senate ads you may have seen Governor Eric Holcomb. He’s not on your ballot this year, but he’s narrating an excellent new ad about the results you’re seeing at the Statehouse, and three public servants who are making it all happen. In the ad, Governor Holcomb explains why he’s supporting Secretary of State Connie Lawson, Auditor Tera Klutz and Treasurer Kelly Mitchell. Secretary of State Connie Lawson is safeguarding the security of our elections and protects seniors from scams. Auditor Tera Klutz is delivering government transparency and accountability. Treasurer Kelly Mitchell has built a strong track record of protecting Hoosier taxpayers. , and be on the lookout tomorrow as Governor Holcomb joins the for stops across Southern and Central Indiana! | | | The Mike Braun Corner | | Mike Braun's Incredible Week! Mike Braun has had an incredible week! He's absolutely everywhere and there's no question that the momentum in this race is fully in his corner. With all this action, here's a quick summary of what you may have missed: Donald Trump Jr. Rally: Mike Braun stood beside President Trump ’s eldest son on Monday at a rally in Greenfield. In case you missed it, check out and ! Solutions Tour Continues : Mike Braun took his Solutions Tour to Greenwood, touring Meredith Machinery, a manufacturing company that is passing its savings through President Trump ’s tax reform along to its employees! Check out ! Talking About the Issues : Mike Braun is making local and national headlines! On Wednesday, he went on Fox & Friends () and sat down with WIBC’s Tony Katz for an interview (). New “Inflatable” Ad : Yesterday, Mike Braun debuted what’s potentially the best ad of the general election so far, called Inflatable. It shows the true Democrat Joe Donnelly – a senator who blows in the wind and won’t stand for Hoosiers. Watch it ! And if you're in Southern or Central Indiana, make sure to for Mike Braun and the Right Track Results Tour! | | | Follow the Right Track Results Tour! is entering its third weekend! Your team of proven Republican leaders are crisscrossing Indiana between now and Election Day, visiting all corners of the state to talk about the RESULTS they’re delivering for Hoosiers! Today, you'll find our Right Track Results team at two events in Northwest Indiana– one in La Porte, the other in Valparaiso. And then tomorrow, Mike Braun , Governor Eric Holcomb , and our congressional and statewide candidates will be taking the Right Track Results bus to stops across Central and Southern Indiana! Visit to see when we’ll be in your area, and follow along with the tour with the hashtag #RightTrackResults! | | | Early Voting Is Now Open! Already know how you plan to vote in this year's general election? Then it's time to VOTE! Early voting is now open across the state. Not sure where to vote early, or early vote hours in your county? Check now to get all the information you need! | "Visit Vote.GOP Now!" | | | Indiana Fact of the Week | | Indiana Legislators Are NOT Yet Required to Pass a Balanced Budget! When you go vote, the first item on your ballot will be Public Question #1, also known as the Balanced Budget Amendment. We encourage you to vote YES on this amendment, which will require Indiana legislators to pass a balanced state budget every two years. Here are the fast facts about the Balanced Budget Amendment: Currently in Indiana, the Generally Assembly is prohibited from carrying government debt year-to-year, but legislators are NOT required to pass a balanced budget – a common misconception. Future generations of Hoosiers deserve the assurance that their leaders at the Statehouse will be fiscally responsible and live within their means. Back in the early 2000s when Democrats where in charge, that definitely wasn't the case as bills went unpaid and the state went deep in the red. With the amendment in place, state pension funds – including teacher, police & firefighter retirement accounts – would be protected. In fact, legislators would be required to actuarially fund these accounts. Check out this on the Balanced Budget Amendment, and feel free to share it with your fellow Hoosiers! | | Upcoming Republican Events : Jay County Republican Candidate Meet & Greet : Halloween Parade in Corydon : Allen County Bean Dinner : Sullivan County Fall Dinner : 5th District House of Representatives Debate : Henry County Republican Club Speech Contest for High School Students November 6: Election Night With the Indiana Republican Party (more details coming soon!) : Tippecanoe County Election Night Celebration : Kosciusko County Republican Women's Christmas Party : Greater Indianapolis Republican Women's Club Annual Holiday Luncheon | | News You Can Use_ Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Secretary of State Connie Lawson Treasurer Kelly Mitchell Auditor Tera Klutz Senator Todd Young Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Todd Rokita Congresswoman Susan Brooks Congressman Luke Messer Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@indiana.gop | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@indiana.gop | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc. 101 W. name: Catherine Gabel
subject: Fwd: are you ready to change this country?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Happy Friday, Peter! With just 11 days until Election Day, we need all hands on deck to make sure we send Sherrod back to the Senate. [**Sherrod personally asked if you can help knock on doors, make calls, and text out the vote -- and I told him I 'd follow up. Can you chip in this weekend?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffee0/4462dc26/727ab563/201f28e1/4194213561/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181026") Healthcare, voting rights, women's rights, workers' rights -- they're all on the ballot. [**Don 't wake up on November 7th wishing you had done more to fight for progress on these critical issues. Sign up to volunteer this weekend.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffee0/4462dc26/727ab563/201f28e1/4194213561/VEsE/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181026") Thanks, Catherine _\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Sherrod Brown
Subject: are you ready to change this country?_ |
---
Peter --
There are just TWO weekends between now and Election Day.
[**I 'm personally asking: Can you volunteer this weekend to help make sure we defend this Senate seat and elect Democrats up-and-down the ticket?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffee0/4462dc26/727ab563/201f28e1/4194213561/VEsF/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181026")
The energy I'm seeing around the state is remarkable. This week I met some great volunteers at a phonebank in Toledo, where they gathered to make calls on behalf of Democratic candidates.
[](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffee0/4462dc26/727ab563/201f28e1/4194213561/VEsC/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181026")
---
I also stopped by a canvass kickoff in Euclid and made a few calls myself.
[](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffee0/4462dc26/727ab563/201f28e1/4194213561/VEsD/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181026")
---
[](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffee0/4462dc26/727ab563/201f28e1/4194213561/VEsA/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181026")
---
Spending time with volunteers before they go out and knock on doors in their communities is nothing short of inspiring.
[](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffee0/4462dc26/727ab563/201f28e1/4194213561/VEsB/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181026")
---
[**We need all hands on deck. Sign up now to help us knock on doors, make phone calls, and text out the vote.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffee0/4462dc26/727ab563/201f28e1/4194213561/VEsO/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181026")
For months, I've been traveling the state, talking about how together, we have the power to change this state -- and this country. Right now, we have a chance to do just that. [**Don 't sit these next two weeks out.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffee0/4462dc26/727ab563/201f28e1/4194213561/VEsP/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181026")
With gratitude,
Sherrod

|
---

name: StaceyAbrams.com
subject: Meet Vino and Paso (photos)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
We met Vino and Paso while canvassing in Valdosta. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa774/34a064cc/3b0a93/70d4086/404717394/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | **We've got 11 days to reach hundreds of thousands of Georgians in all 159 counties. Sign up for a volunteer shift and let's get it done:** **[VOLUNTEER](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa774/34a064cc/3b0a93/70d4087/404717394/VEsE/ "http://bit.ly/DemVolEvents")** Friend - We often say we're running a different type of campaign - one that reaches out to folks in communities most candidates ignore. Today, we want to show you exactly what that looks like. [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa774/34a064cc/3b0a93/70d4087/404717394/VEsF/ "http://bit.ly/DemVolEvents") **We met Vino and Paso while canvassing in Valdosta - a small city down near the Florida-Georgia line. Here's what they had to say about Stacey Abrams and our people-powered campaign: ** Vino: _"I think Stacey'll be a positive impact on the community because she got people out here doing road work - if that's what y'all call it - street work. Knocking on doors. Usually people don't do that, or they don't come on this side of town. They go to other communities, where it looks a little better. A little nicer."_ Paso: _"That's why I feel like Stacey's gonna get this community right. I just know it."_ Vino: _"Better job opportunities. That's what we need, for real. And I think her team's doing a pretty good job, ya know? They're active in the community. They're not scared to walk up and see what we're doin'. Ask us questions. No matter how many times they come through, they come through."_ Paso: _"I love what y'all doin' out here. Most people don't even do that. We wouldn't usually be talkin' about politics."_ [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa774/34a064cc/3b0a93/70d4087/404717394/VEsC/ "http://bit.ly/DemVolEvents") Vino: _"People don't come in our communities to ask us what we need help on and stuff. Stacey does. She appreciates us. And we appreciate her."_ Paso: _"And we appreciate y'all for comin' through. And y'all inspire me to do better, to make me do what y'all do."_ Vino and Paso haven't just spoken with our campaign or met a few canvassers. They've already voted early for Stacey Abrams, and they aren't alone. Because when we show up where people are to hear their concerns and learn what matters to them, they are excited to join our campaign and push us one vote closer to victory. **Your belief in Georgia makes that possible. Your contributions helped us open 17 field offices across the state, hire organizers, and train volunteers who are talking to Georgians like Vino and Paso every single day.** With only **11 days** left, we can't let up now. Because there are still hundreds of thousands of Georgians in places like Valdosta who need a reason to hope again and cast their ballot for a better future. **[Stand with Stacey Abrams. Stand with Vino and Paso. Sign up for a volunteer shift where you live and push Stacey Abrams closer to victory with every door knock and every conversation. Your contributions got us here, and now our feet will get the job done for Georgia.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa774/34a064cc/3b0a93/70d4087/404717394/VEsD/ "http://bit.ly/DemVolEvents")** Thank you for volunteering with us, \- Team Abrams
---

Sign up for a volunteer shift and let's get it done: "" Friend - We often say we're running a different type of campaign - one that reaches out to folks in communities most candidates ignore. Today, we want to show you exactly what that looks like. "" We met Vino and Paso while canvassing in Valdosta - a small city down near the Florida-Georgia line. Here's what they had to say about Stacey Abrams and our people-powered campaign: Vino: "I think Stacey'll be a positive impact on the community because she got people out here doing road work - if that's what y'all call it - street work. Knocking on doors. Usually people don't do that, or they don't come on this side of town. They go to other communities, where it looks a little better. A little nicer." Paso: "That's why I feel like Stacey's gonna get this community right. I just know it." Vino: "Better job opportunities. That's what we need, for real. And I think her team's doing a pretty good job, ya know? They're active in the community. They're not scared to walk up and see what we're doin'. Ask us questions. No matter how many times they come through, they come through." Paso: "I love what y'all doin' out here. Most people don't even do that. We wouldn't usually be talkin' about politics." "" Vino: "People don't come in our communities to ask us what we need help on and stuff. Stacey does. She appreciates us. And we appreciate her." Paso: "And we appreciate y'all for comin' through. And y'all inspire me to do better, to make me do what y'all do." Vino and Paso haven't just spoken with our campaign or met a few canvassers. They've already voted early for Stacey Abrams, and they aren't alone. Because when we show up where people are to hear their concerns and learn what matters to them, they are excited to join our campaign and push us one vote closer to victory. name: Anne Holton
subject: I don't love doing this, but it's important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
I don't love emailing you to ask for donations. But it's important. Here's why I do it: ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- I don't love emailing you to ask for donations. But it's important. Here's why I do it: **The election is in 11 days, and right now, there are two major ways to make sure Democrats win in Virginia:[Volunteer and donate](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f8/3e0906/74d54ed0/3e373d1d/1479883639/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Volunteer+and+donate&utm_campaign=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&source=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND").**

Volunteering is critical, and I sure hope you can make the time to get out there and talk to voters. But donating is also important, especially this close to Election Day. Whatever you're able to pitch in right now goes directly towards reaching out to people to tell them when and how to vote. **Your donations fund digital ads, mailers, and supplies for our field team._Your donations make it possible for us to reach every single person who needs to get out and vote. Without them, we can't._**

[The campaign has a goal of raising $80,000 by midnight on October 31st, and they're not there yet. Can you chip in right now to get them $10,000 closer to that goal by tonight?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f8/3e0906/74d54ed0/3e373d1c/1479883639/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+The+campaign+has+a+goal+of+raising+80000&utm_campaign=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&source=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f8/3e0906/74d54ed0/3e373d13/1479883639/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+5&utm_campaign=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&source=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND")
---
| [**$25**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f8/3e0906/74d54ed0/3e373d12/1479883639/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+25&utm_campaign=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&source=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND")
---
| [**$50**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f8/3e0906/74d54ed0/3e373d11/1479883639/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+50&utm_campaign=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&source=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND")
---
| [**$100**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f8/3e0906/74d54ed0/3e373d10/1479883639/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+100&utm_campaign=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&source=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND")
---
| [**$250**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f8/3e0906/74d54ed0/3e373d17/1479883639/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+250&utm_campaign=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&source=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND")
---
| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f8/3e0906/74d54ed0/3e373d16/1479883639/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&source=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND")
---
Reaching that end-of-month goal and reaching all of the voters we need to talk to isn't just about winning on November 6th - it's about something much, much bigger than that. A win for Democrats means protecting the values we share - inclusivity, positivity, opportunity for all. These are the things that Tim has cared about since the day I met him, and I know he'll fight tooth and nail to keep advancing thoughtful leadership for Virginia.

And it's more than just Tim. Just last week my friend Dorothy McAuliffe and I went to a canvass for Jennifer Wexton, and let me tell you, she is an amazing leader who will do us proud in the House - and there are incredible candidates like her in every single district in our Commonwealth! They are ready to move us forward in Washington, D.C. - and I'm ready to help them.

**Are you? Please make a donation to help the campaign raise $10,000 today so they can get closer to their $80,000 end-of-month goal:**

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Emergency-October-Goal](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f8/3e0906/74d54ed0/3e373d15/1479883639/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+httpssecuretimkainecomEmergencyOctoberGo&utm_campaign=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&source=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND")

We hear a lot about the "blue wave" coming - but we can't forget that this wave isn't just something that's going to happen to us. It's going to happen _because of us_. So thank you for all you're doing to bring it on!

_Anne Holton_

[**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f8/3e0906/74d54ed0/3e373d14/1479883639/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&source=20181026_3_FR_AH_Anne-LDND")

Just last week my friend Dorothy McAuliffe and I went to a canvass for Jennifer Wexton, and let me tell you, she is an amazing leader who will do us proud in the House - and there are incredible candidates like her in every single district in our Commonwealth! They are ready to move us forward in Washington, D.C. - and I'm ready to help them. Are you? Please make a donation to help the campaign raise $10,000 today so they can get closer to their $80,000 end-of-month goal: "" We hear a lot about the "blue wave" coming - but we can't forget that this wave isn't just something that's going to happen to us. It's going to happen because of us. So thank you for all you're doing to bring it on! Anne Holton "" * | "" "" ""
